description_long: This object is a weathered, cylindrical can with a metallic texture and a deep, mottled red surface, showing signs of rust and wear. Both ends are capped with dull, grayish metal, with one end featuring a typical pull-tab indentation, indicating it is a beverage can. The body is covered in irregular patches of discoloration and surface abrasions, suggesting prolonged exposure to the elements. The can's surface is reflective in places, with a glossy sheen that highlights its uneven, corroded finish. There are no visible labels or branding, and the can appears empty, as no liquid or contents are visible through the opaque exterior. The overall appearance suggests it is an old, discarded soda or beer can commonly found in urban environments.
description: A rusted, metallic beverage can with a mottled red and gray surface, showing heavy wear and no visible branding. The can is cylindrical, capped at both ends, and appears empty.
description_view_0: Side view of the can, showing the mottled red, rusted surface and both metallic end caps.
description_view_1: View of the can's pull-tab end, with the circular indentation and worn metallic texture clearly visible.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, highlighting the glossy, corroded red body and both end caps.
description_view_3: View of the can's bottom, showing a flat, scratched metallic surface with no opening.
attribute_damage_or_deformation: Visible rust, discoloration, and surface abrasions; no major dents or cracks.
